title: helichrysum archimedeum
intro: Helichrysum archimedeum, also known as Everlasting or Immortelle, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum archimedeum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. This plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally for medicinal purposes.
